tripOverview.intro: San Juan enchants with its colorful colonial architecture, pristine beaches, and vibrant culture that blends Spanish heritage with Caribbean flair. This romantic Caribbean paradise offers historic cobblestone streets, world-class cuisine, and crystal-clear waters perfect for intimate getaways.
tripOverview.vibe: A perfect blend of historic romance, beach relaxation, and vibrant nightlife in an LGBTQ+-friendly Caribbean paradise.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with warm temperatures, low humidity, and minimal rainfall - ideal for beach activities and sightseeing.

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: UNESCO World Heritage site with colorful colonial architecture and historic forts.

attractions.name: El Yunque Rainforest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls, hiking trails, and diverse wildlife.

attractions.name: Flamenco Beach
attractions.desc: World-renowned beach on Culebra island with pristine white sand.

attractions.name: Bioluminescent Bay
attractions.desc: Magical kayaking experience through glowing waters in Laguna Grande.

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular urban beach with restaurants, bars, and water sports.

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan offers excellent public transportation with the Tren Urbano metro system connecting major areas and AMA buses covering the metropolitan area. Taxis are readily available and use meters, while ride-sharing services like Uber operate throughout the city. For exploring beaches and attractions outside the metro area, consider renting a car or booking organized tours.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the AMA bus app for real-time schedules and always confirm taxi rates before starting your journey - most tourist areas are very walkable and safe during daylight hours.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally very safe for tourists, especially in Old San Juan, Condado, and other major tourist areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that work seamlessly across Puerto Rico for navigation, translation, and sharing your romantic moments.

itineraryOverview.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico

days.intro: Start your romantic Puerto Rican adventure exploring the enchanting cobblestone streets of Old San Juan.

morning.name: Arrive & Check-in
morning.desc: Settle into your hotel and get oriented in beautiful San Juan.

morning.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
morning.desc: Self-guided exploration of the colorful colonial streets and historic buildings.

afternoon.name: Castillo San Felipe del Morro
afternoon.desc: Explore the iconic 16th-century fortress with stunning ocean views.

afternoon.name: Paseo de la Princesa
afternoon.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for photos and sunset views.

evening.name: Welcome Dinner
evening.desc: Intimate vegetarian dinner at a local restaurant with live music.

evening.name: Evening Stroll
evening.desc: Romantic walk through illuminated Old San Juan streets.

days.tip: Wear comfortable walking shoes for the cobblestone streets and bring a light jacket for evening breezes.

days.intro: Spend your day soaking up the sun and enjoying the pristine waters of Condado Beach.

morning.name: Beach Setup
morning.desc: Claim your spot on beautiful Condado Beach with crystal-clear waters.

morning.name: Beach Relaxation
morning.desc: Sunbathing, swimming, and romantic beach time together.

afternoon.name: Beachside Lunch
afternoon.desc: Fresh vegetarian cuisine at an oceanfront restaurant.

afternoon.name: Water Sports
afternoon.desc: Paddleboard or kayak rental for two hours of fun on the water.

evening.name: Beach Sunset
evening.desc: Watch the magical Caribbean sunset from the beach.

evening.name: Dinner & Cocktails
evening.desc: Romantic beachfront dining with craft cocktails and live music.

days.tip: Bring reef-safe sunscreen and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than it feels.

days.intro: Dive deep into Puerto Rican art, culture, and history with museum visits and local experiences.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore Puerto Rico's finest art collection in this beautiful museum.

morning.name: Gallery Walk in Santurce
morning.desc: Discover vibrant street art and local galleries in the arts district.

afternoon.name: Local Market Visit
afternoon.desc: Browse fresh produce and local crafts at Mercado de Río Piedras.

afternoon.name: Coffee Plantation Tour
afternoon.desc: Learn about Puerto Rican coffee culture with tastings included.

evening.name: Cooking Class
evening.desc: Learn to make traditional vegetarian Puerto Rican dishes together.

evening.name: Live Music Venue
evening.desc: Experience authentic salsa and reggaeton at a local LGBTQ+-friendly bar.

days.tip: Many museums offer free admission on certain days - check their websites for special promotions.

days.intro: Embark on an exciting journey to El Yunque Rainforest for hiking, waterfalls, and natural beauty.

morning.name: El Yunque Departure
morning.desc: Guided tour to the tropical rainforest with transportation included.

morning.name: Waterfall Hike
morning.desc: Moderate hike to stunning waterfalls with opportunities for photos.

afternoon.name: Picnic Lunch
afternoon.desc: Vegetarian lunch surrounded by lush rainforest scenery.

afternoon.name: Nature Exploration
afternoon.desc: Discover unique flora and fauna with your knowledgeable guide.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Comfortable transportation back to your hotel.

evening.name: Relaxed Dinner
evening.desc: Casual vegetarian meal to unwind after your adventure day.

days.tip: Wear hiking shoes, bring insect repellent, and pack a waterproof bag for your belongings.

days.intro: Indulge in a day of romance with spa treatments, sunset cruises, and intimate dining.

morning.name: Couples Spa Treatment
morning.desc: Relaxing massage and spa experience designed for couples.

morning.name: Hotel Pool Time
morning.desc: Private relaxation by the pool with tropical drinks.

afternoon.name: Romantic Lunch
afternoon.desc: Intimate vegetarian meal with ocean views at a boutique restaurant.

afternoon.name: Sunset Catamaran Cruise
afternoon.desc: Romantic sailing experience with drinks and appetizers included.

evening.name: Fine Dining Experience
evening.desc: Upscale vegetarian tasting menu at one of San Juan's best restaurants.

evening.name: Rooftop Cocktails
evening.desc: Craft cocktails with panoramic city views at a romantic rooftop bar.

days.tip: Book spa treatments and the sunset cruise in advance - these romantic experiences fill up quickly.

days.intro: Take a ferry to Culebra Island to experience the world-famous Flamenco Beach.

morning.name: Ferry to Culebra
morning.desc: Early morning ferry ride to reach paradise island.

morning.name: Flamenco Beach Arrival
morning.desc: Set up at one of the world's most beautiful beaches.

afternoon.name: Beach Picnic
afternoon.desc: Vegetarian lunch packed from local market with tropical fruits.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling Adventure
afternoon.desc: Explore underwater marine life in crystal-clear Caribbean waters.

evening.name: Return Ferry
evening.desc: Evening ferry back to the main island.

evening.name: Celebration Dinner
evening.desc: Special vegetarian dinner to celebrate your amazing beach day.

days.tip: Bring plenty of water, snacks, and cash as Culebra has limited facilities - ferries can sell out during peak season.

days.intro: Make the most of your final day with rum tasting, shopping, and one last romantic evening.

morning.name: Casa Bacardí Tour
morning.desc: Learn about Puerto Rico's famous rum heritage with tastings included.

morning.name: Souvenir Shopping
morning.desc: Browse local crafts and gifts at Old San Juan boutiques.

afternoon.name: Final Beach Time
afternoon.desc: Last chance to enjoy the beautiful Caribbean waters.

afternoon.name: Packing & Rest
afternoon.desc: Prepare for departure and relax at your hotel.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner
evening.desc: Memorable final meal featuring the best vegetarian Puerto Rican cuisine.

evening.name: Nightlife Experience
evening.desc: Celebrate your last night at an LGBTQ+-friendly venue with dancing.

days.tip: Check your flight details and arrange airport transportation the night before - save room in your luggage for souvenirs!

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene brilliantly blends Spanish, Taíno, and African influences with modern vegetarian innovations.
food.tip: Puerto Ricans typically eat dinner late (8-10 PM) and tipping 18-20% is standard at restaurants - many establishments are very accommodating to vegetarian requests.

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and romantic atmosphere

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.whyStay: Direct beach access and vibrant nightlife scene

neighborhoods.name: Santurce
neighborhoods.whyStay: Authentic local experience and LGBTQ+-friendly venues

luxury.name: La Concha Renaissance San Juan Resort

hotels.tip: Book accommodations with ocean views for the most romantic experience, and many hotels offer LGBTQ+-friendly amenities and services.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Full-day guided tour with waterfalls, hiking, and natural pools including transportation.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Night Kayaking
getYourGuide.desc: Magical evening kayaking experience in Laguna Grande's glowing waters with expert guides.

getYourGuide.name: Old San Juan Food and Culture Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Walking tour combining historical sites with vegetarian-friendly local cuisine tastings.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset strolls and photography.

hiddenGems.name: La Placita de Santurce
hiddenGems.desc: Local nightlife hub with LGBTQ+-friendly bars and authentic Puerto Rican atmosphere.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave exploration with stunning valley views and unique geological formations.

packing.title: April San Juan Packing Guide
packing.intro: Pack for warm, tropical weather with occasional light rain showers and strong Caribbean sun.
packing.luggage: A medium-sized suitcase plus a daypack for beach and hiking excursions works perfectly for this trip length.
packing.tip: Pack light, breathable fabrics and always bring reef-safe sunscreen - regular sunscreen damages the coral reefs you'll be swimming near.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to San Juan typically cost $380-450 per person in April with 2-3 hour total travel time.
